arts.ttl: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers' classy message to Arsenal and Kieran Tierney after Real Madrid heroics
arts.sum: Whilst Rodgers narrowly missed out on a last-16 place amongst Europe’s elite, the Celtic boss still found the time to send the Premier League club and Tierney a message about their superb wins over Real Madrid over two legs. But ultimately, that result wasn’t enough to continue Celtic’s journey in the competition but it still did not stop Rodgers from sending Arsenal and Hoops-bound Kieran Tierney after beating Real Madrid to secure their place in the semi-final this week.

arts.ttl: Ex Celtic loan star lined up for mega transfer move to European giants just 3 months after leaving Parkhead
arts.sum: Bundesliga big hitters Borussia Dortmund want to snap up Alex Valle from Barcelona this summer

arts.ttl: Taylor vs Schlupp: The numbers behind Celtic's left-back selection debate
arts.sum: Following Celtic’s competitive showing in the Champions League Play-Off round defeat to Bayern Munich, it seemed that loanee Jeffrey Schlupp had won the fight to become the Hoops starting left-back.

arts.ttl: John McGinn makes Kieran Tierney feelings clear on Celtic return as Aston Villa hero convinced of one thing
arts.sum: The Hoops diehard is on his way back to his boyhood heroes this summer after penning a pre-contract deal from the Gunners

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers urged to axe Celtic star from XI for Scottish Cup semi-final vs St Johnstone
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers told to axe Adam Idah from Celtic’s XI for Scottish Cup semi-final vs St Johnstone Paul Slane has told Open Goal that Idah has to ‘come out’ of the Celtic XI against St Johnstone because he just didn’t show enough in the last match.

arts.ttl: John McGinn shares what he really thinks of Kieran Tierney joining Celtic after Arsenal beat Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Gunners have reached the semi-final of the competition and after John McGinn exited the tournament after the defeat by PSG, the Aston Villa captain paid tribute to Tierney and shared what he really thought about the Arsenal defender’s move to Celtic . A life-long Celtic fan, Tierney’s return to Celtic will undoubtedly strenthen Brendan Rodgers’ first-team, especially after how the Scotland defender has contributed to Arsenal’s Champions League campain this season.

arts.ttl: John McGinn delivers verdict on Kieran Tierney's Celtic return
arts.sum: John McGinn is 'really pleased' that Kieran Tierney is joining Celtic this summer.

arts.ttl: Celtic team news and Predicted XI vs St Johnstone: Brendan Rodgers' big calls
arts.sum: Celtic take on St Johnstone in the Scottish Cup semi-final on Sunday as the Bhoys continue to hunt for a treble.

arts.ttl: Celtic's Scottish Cup dominance in numbers
arts.sum: Celtic head to Hampden to face St Johnstone in Sunday's Scottish Cup semi-final looking to improve on some impressive records in the competition.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton warns Robbie Savage about Celtic claim after Aston Villa's Champions League exit
arts.sum: Whilst the vast majority of Celtic supporters will see getting out of the group as a success, Chris Sutton has to put Robbie Savage straight once again after he ‘misquoted’ the Hoops legend’s verdict on the defeat in Munich. Sutton puts Savage straight on Celtic’s Champions League performance vs Bayern Munich
